description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed glasses with a thin, metallic full-rim frame. The lenses are dark, likely tinted for sun protection, and are set within a delicate, circular structure. The bridge is a simple, straight metal bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads. The temples are slender and straight, featuring a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The overall design is minimalist and classic, reminiscent of vintage or retro eyewear styles. No visible brand markings or embellishments are present on the frame or temples.
description: A pair of round, dark-lensed glasses with a thin metallic frame and minimalist, vintage-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round lenses, thin full-rim frame, and straight bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim temple and the profile of the circular lens frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and the curvature of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the side profile of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a classic round geometry with a thin, full-rim structure. The rims are delicate and uniform in thickness, giving the glasses a lightweight and minimalist appearance. The temples are straight and slender, with a slight curve at the ends for comfort. The overall style is vintage-inspired and unembellished.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are a deep, dark blue tint, providing significant shading. The tint appears uniform across the entire lens surface, with no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, narrow metal bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. It is simple and functional, matching the minimalist design of the frame.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and straight, with a slight curve at the tips. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements, maintaining a clean and understated look.
